data.description: Wispy dark text floats above each player head, persisting until they send a new message. Press T to open chat, Enter to send, Escape to cancel. Own messages show as on-screen toast.
data.title: Add ephemeral chat bubbles above player avatars

data.body: Implemented ephemeral chat bubbles across 5 files. Server (ws-handler.js) broadcasts chat messages fire-and-forget. Network layer (network.js) added sendChat/getMyId/onChat. PlayerManager (players.js) renders wispy dark Georgia serif text as billboard sprites above avatars — no container, persists until replaced by new message. Main.js wires chat UI: T to open, Enter to send, Escape to cancel, own messages show as toast. Committed on chat-feature branch (387f810).
